copilotInsights.config.title: Copilot Insights
copilotInsights.config.showMood.descript: Show a fun 'mood' indicator for your remaining quota instead of the standard status.
copilotInsights.config.progressBarMode.d: Controls how the progress bar displays quota: 'remaining' shows quota left (default), 'used' shows quota consumed.
copilotInsights.config.progressBarMode.r: Show remaining quota (bar empties as you use requests)
copilotInsights.config.progressBarMode.u: Show used quota (bar fills as you use requests)
copilotInsights.config.pollingIntervalSe: Refresh Copilot quota data automatically every N seconds. Set to 0 to disable background polling.
copilotInsights.config.statusBarLocation: Controls where the Copilot status bar appears: 'right' (original location), 'left' (bottom status bar), or 'both' (show on both sides).
Show status bar on the right side (original location)
Show status bar on the left side (bottom status bar)
Show status bar on both sides
copilotInsights.config.statusBarStyle.de: Controls the visual style of the status bar indicator.
Original (Detailed): Show name, numerical quota and percentage (e.g., 'Copilot: 20/100 (80%)')
copilotInsights.config.statusBarStyle.pr: Progress Capsule: Show percentage wrapped in large circular caps (e.g., '◖ 80% ◗')
copilotInsights.config.statusBarStyle.ci: Circular Progress Ring: Show a circular ring progression (e.g., '◔ 80%')
copilotInsights.config.statusBarStyle.so: Solid Progress Bar: Show visual solid blocks (e.g., '████░ 80%')
copilotInsights.config.statusBarStyle.sh: Shaded Progress Bar: Show visual shaded blocks (e.g., '▓▓▓▓░ 80%')
copilotInsights.config.statusBarStyle.mi: Minimalist: Show icon and percentage only (e.g., '80%')
copilotInsights.config.statusBarStyle.ad: Adaptive Status Emoji: Show an emoji-based status indicator (e.g., '😌 80%')
copilotInsights.config.statusBar.showNum: Show numerical quota (e.g., '20/100') in status bar.
copilotInsights.config.statusBar.showVis: Show visual indicator (e.g., progress bars, rings, emojis) in status bar.
copilotInsights.config.statusBar.enableC: Color the status bar item background based on remaining AI credits: red when over quota, yellow when below 20% remaining. Also switches to warning/error icons. Disable this if you have an overage budget and don't want the status bar to change color when standard credits run out.
copilotInsights.config.customCreditLimit: Set a custom AI credit limit higher than your plan's built-in entitlement. When set to a value greater than your plan entitlement, progress bars, percentages, pacing, and alerts will track against this custom limit instead. Useful if you have overage enabled and want to budget a specific number of AI credits per month. Set to 0 to use your plan's default entitlement.
copilotInsights.config.alertThresholds.d: Usage percentages (of your AI credit quota or custom limit) at which to show a warning notification. Each threshold fires at most once per billing period. Set to an empty array to disable usage alerts.
copilotInsights.config.dailyBudget.descr: Optional daily AI credit budget. When set above 0, the Sprint Burn-down section shows today's usage against this budget. Set to 0 to disable.
copilotInsights.config.notifyOnReset.des: Show an information notification when your Copilot billing period rolls over and the AI credit quota resets.
copilotInsights.config.autoExport.enable: Automatically export the local snapshot history to a file once per day. Requires an export folder to be set.
copilotInsights.config.autoExport.folder: Folder where the automatic history export is written (as 'copilot-insights-history.json' or '.csv'). A leading '~' is expanded to your home directory. Leave empty to disable.
copilotInsights.config.autoExport.format: File format used for the automatic history export.
copilotInsights.lmTool.userDescription: Your Copilot plan and AI credit quota status
copilotInsights.walkthrough.title: Get Started with Copilot Insights
copilotInsights.walkthrough.description: See your GitHub Copilot plan, AI credit quota, and usage trends at a glance.
copilotInsights.walkthrough.openView.des:
See your plan, quota cards, pacing guidance, and the sprint burn-down chart.
[Open Copilot Insights](command:copilotInsights.sidebarView.focus)
copilotInsights.walkthrough.statusBarSty:
Choose from seven quota indicator styles with a live preview.
[Choose Style](command:vscode-copilot-insights.chooseStatusBarStyle)
copilotInsights.walkthrough.alertsAndBud: Set alerts and a daily budget

Configure usage alert thresholds and an optional daily AI credit budget so you never get surprised.
[Open Settings](command:vscode-copilot-insights.openSettings)
copilotInsights.walkthrough.exportAndCha:
Copy a Markdown summary from the view, export your local history, or ask Copilot Chat about your quota using #copilotQuota.
[Export History](command:vscode-copilot-insights.exportHistory)
